allow: PowerShell("GH_TOKEN set: $\([bool]$env:GH_TOKEN\)"; "GITHUB_TOKEN set: $\([bool]$env:GITHUB_TOKEN\)"; git config --get user.name; git config --get user.email; "---credential helper---"; git config --get credential.helper)

PowerShell($input = "protocol=https`nhost=github.com`n`n"; $result = $input | git credential fill 2>$null; $result | ForEach-Object { if \($_ -match '^\(username\)='\) { $_ } elseif \($_ -match '^password='\) { "password=<<retrieved length $\($_.Length - 9\)>>" } else { $_ } })

Bash(node -e "import\('./src/audio.js'\).then\(m=>{m.audio.clash\(1\);m.audio.hit\(1\);m.audio.block\(1\);console.log\('audio import + no-ctx calls safe in node:', typeof m.audio.resume==='function'\)}\)")

PowerShell($tools = 'yt-dlp','ffmpeg','python'; foreach \($t in $tools\) { $c = Get-Command $t -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { Write-Output "$t : $\($c.Source\)" } else { Write-Output "$t : NOT FOUND" } })

PowerShell($sp = "C:\\Users\\cheng\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\claude\\C--Users-cheng-Documents-repositories-gladiator3\\255f19c0-7614-47a8-ade1-35ecd6924545\\scratchpad"; $html = [IO.File]::ReadAllText\("$sp\\try3.html"\); $idx = 0; for \($k=0; $k -lt 3; $k++\) { $i = $html.IndexOf\('vrhm', $idx\); if \($i -lt 0\) { break }; Write-Output $html.Substring\($i, [Math]::Min\(600, $html.Length - $i\)\); Write-Output '====='; $idx = $i + 4 })

PowerShell($sp = "C:\\Users\\cheng\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\claude\\C--Users-cheng-Documents-repositories-gladiator3\\255f19c0-7614-47a8-ade1-35ecd6924545\\scratchpad"; $html = [System.Net.WebUtility]::HtmlDecode\([IO.File]::ReadAllText\("$sp\\try3.html"\)\); $idx = 0; for \($k=0; $k -lt 4; $k++\) { $i = $html.IndexOf\('youtube', $idx, [StringComparison]::OrdinalIgnoreCase\); if \($i -lt 0\) { break }; $s = [Math]::Max\(0, $i-200\); Write-Output $html.Substring\($s, [Math]::Min\(400, $html.Length - $s\)\); Write-Output '====='; $idx = $i + 7 })

PowerShell($sp = "C:\\Users\\cheng\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\claude\\C--Users-cheng-Documents-repositories-gladiator3\\255f19c0-7614-47a8-ade1-35ecd6924545\\scratchpad"; $ua = "Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 \(KHTML, like Gecko\) Chrome/126.0 Safari/537.36"; $found = $false; foreach \($first in 1,36,71\) { $u = "https://www.bing.com/videos/asyncv2?q=half+sword+heavy+swing+short+clip&async=content&first=$first&count=35"; curl.exe -s -A $ua -H "Accept-Language: en-US,en;q=0.9" -o "$sp\\async$first.html" $u; $html = [System.Net.WebUtility]::HtmlDecode\([IO.File]::ReadAllText\("$sp\\async$first.html"\)\); $mids = [regex]::Matches\($html, '"mid":"\([0-9A-F]{40}\)","murl":"\([^"]+\)"'\); Write-Output "first=$first len=$\($html.Length\) tiles=$\($mids.Count\)"; foreach \($t in $mids\) { if \($t.Groups[1].Value -eq "26C43DAB5DB74374F1D526C43DAB5DB74374F1D5"\) { Write-Output ">>> FOUND: $\($t.Groups[2].Value\)"; $found = $true } }; if \($found\) { break } })
